Name: Main Controller
Description: Main microcontroller for image processing (ML) and motor control.

Name: Camera Sensor
Description: RPI CAM V2 IMX219 8MP

Name: Cellular Data Modem
Description: Low-power cellular module for remote location data transmission, providing real-time live tracking capabilities.

Name: Battery Management System
Product Name: TP4056 Li-Ion Charger Module with Protection

Name: Voltage Regulator for Pi
Description: Regulates power from the main 12V supply to 5V for ESP32-S3 modules and various sensors.

Name: AI Accelerator (Optional)
Description: GPU acceleration for Hashcat and other compute-intensive tasks.

Name: Main Enclosure
Description: Protective housing for all electronics, rated IP67 for water and dust resistance.

Name: Enclosure Gasket
Description: Provides a watertight seal between enclosure lid and base.

Name: Camera Lens Window
Description: Impact-resistant, clear window for the camera lens, sealed into the enclosure.

Name: Enclosure Lid Screws
Description: Secures the enclosure lid to the base, maintaining the IP67 seal.

Name: Internal Component Mount Screws
Description: Small screws for securing various components to 3D-printed internal mounts.

Name: M3 Heat-Set Inserts
Description: Brass threaded inserts for creating robust screw threads in 3D-printed parts.

Name: Camera Module Mount
Description: 3D-printed bracket to securely mount the camera module.

Name: MCU Mount Plate
Description: 3D-printed plate for mounting the main microcontroller securely inside the enclosure.

Name: Cellular Modem Mount
Description: Custom mount to hold the cellular modem module.

Name: Battery Pack Holder
Description: Holder designed to securely cradle the LiPo battery pack, preventing movement.

Name: Battery Management Mount
Description: Small bracket for mounting the battery management system board.

Name: Buck Converter Mount
Description: Mounting piece for the voltage regulator board.

Name: AI Accelerator Mount
Description: If included, this mount holds the AI accelerator board.

Name: Internal Base Plate
Description: Flat 3D-printed panel inside the enclosure to mount other components and organize wiring.

Name: Camera Lens Shroud
Description: 3D-printed shroud to focus the camera lens through the polycarbonate window and block internal reflections.

Name: Trashcan Clamp (Top)
Description: Upper part of a two-piece clamp system designed to secure the device to the inner rim of a trashcan.

Name: Trashcan Clamp (Bottom)
Description: Lower part of a two-piece clamp system designed to secure the device to the inner rim of a trashcan.

Name: Clamp Thumb Screw
Description: Thumb screw to tighten the 3D-printed trashcan clamp for tool-less installation.

Name: Clamp Nut
Description: Lock nut to secure the thumb screw for the trashcan clamp.

Name: Cable Management Clip
Description: Small clips to route and secure internal wiring for a tidy and robust assembly.
